trueend_access.title: Find the access point to the True End — Beyond the Dream dimension (look for unusual End structures)

trueend_enter.title: Enter the True End — Beyond the Dream dimension

subtitle.text: The End is a threshold. Beyond the Dream is what lies past it.

description: True End adds a dimension beyond the End — Beyond the Dream.
It is accessed through a specific structure or ritual that generates in the End's outer islands.
Look for unusual geometric structures that don't match vanilla End City architecture.
The dimension is surreal, void-adjacent, and contains unique loot and enemies.
It is not the final destination. It is the space between destinations.
This aligns with the Frieren theme of Ch13-15:
the journey continues past the point where most stories end.
You have defeated the dragon. The world continues.
What lies beyond the dream is not the ending — it is another beginning.
→ Find the access point to Beyond the Dream [check]
